Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 x64 with latest updates
  • Processor: Quad core CPU with SSE4.2 support
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Videocard with hardware* ray tracing support - NVIDIA RTX™ 2060
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Keyboard & scroll wheel mouse are required. *Technically NVIDIA GTX 1080Ti/1080/1070/1060 (only 6GB version) videocards also can run Buildmark in software RTX mode, but it will be unplayable due to low ray tracing performance (enough for benchmarking, though).

  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX™ 4090
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Keyboard & scroll wheel mouse are required, wide screen monitor (21:9 and wider) is strongly recommended, fast NVMe SSD also will be handy.
